notes: Cemented doublet lens; f/4 focal ratio; threaded front objective cell with 0-20mm adjustable back focus; M42x0.75 male thread on rear plus 1.25" barrel with locking screws; includes guide rings and Vixen/Synta style dovetail; recommended for main scopes up to ~1200mm FL

Triplet APO with built-in ED glass; f/5 focal ratio; non-rotating helical focuser with locking screw; M42x0.75 male thread on rear plus 1.25" barrel; quick-release dovetail plate; recommended for main scopes up to 750mm FL; upgraded replacement for the 30F4

Multi-coated f/4.6 doublet; rotatable 1.25" helical focuser with 30mm travel; 15mm published back focus; includes two mounting rings with six alignment screws and Vixen-style dovetail rail with five 1/4-20 holes; CNC-machined aluminum; recommended for main scopes up to ~1500mm FL

Doublet lens design; fully multi-coated; f/4 focal ratio; 5.7 degree field of view; 1.25" RotoLock adapter (twist-lock) with M48 male thread underneath; front-cell focusing; available in slide-base variant (integrated Vixen dovetail for WO carry handles) and bracket-mount variant; multiple color options (black/red/gold/space grey)

Doublet objective lens; f/4 focal ratio; helical focuser with 20mm travel; X and Y axis fine adjustment screws; 1.25" adapter and M42 threaded adapter included; Vixen-style finder base bracket; CNC machined aluminum; available in black or silver

Doublet objective lens; f/4 focal ratio; aperture area 164% larger than the 32mm model; helical focuser; X and Y axis fine adjustment; 1.25" adapter and M42 threaded adapter included; can also be used for visual observation; limiting magnitude approximately 10.4

Doublet objective lens with SD (super extra-low dispersion) glass; f/4.8 focal ratio; helical focuser with 25mm travel; 1.25" adapter and M42 threaded adapter plus two 40mm extension tubes included; extension tubes and adapter are removable to accommodate different camera back focus distances; can also be used for visual observation and astrophotography

ED doublet APO refractor using Ohara S-FPL53 glass; f/4.8 focal ratio; non-rotating helical focuser with 18mm drawtube travel; T2 (M42x0.75) thread and 1.25" socket; 20mm back focus (60mm with included 40mm extension tube removed); includes collimation rings with nylon-tipped screws; sold as 50ED (SKU 10199) internationally and 50DX (SKU S11174) in North America with tube rings and Vixen-style plate; approximately 865g per multiple retailer sources
